revision.text:
[[ja:愛宕神社 (久喜市久喜中央)]] {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] ||name=Atago Shrine (Kuki Chuo)|native_name = 愛宕神社 | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}} | image = File:Kuki Kukichuo Atago Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px
Main Worship Hall (July 2012) | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki City|1=Kuki, Saitama}}Kuki Chuo 1-chome | latitude_degrees = 36 | latitude_minutes = 4 | latitude_seconds = 5.3 | NS = N | longitude_degrees = 139 | longitude_minutes = 40 | longitude_seconds = 39.8 | EW = E | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|deity = {{ill|Kagu-tsuchi|qid=Q1640658|1=Kagu-tsuchi}} | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|type = {{ill|Village Shrine|de|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} | founding = | main_hall = | alias = Atago-sama (愛宕様) | religious_affiliation = {{ill|Shinto|en|Shinto|qid=Q812767|lt=Shinto|1=Shinto}}|festival = July 24『久喜市史調査報告書 第3集　久喜の祭りと行事（86ページ）』 久喜市史編集室, Kuki City, March 25, Showa 59 | rituals = | label_location = top | location_map = Japan Saitama | location = {{ill|Kuki|qid=Q47535|1=Kuki, Saitama}} | coordinates = {{Coord|36.06813888888889|N|139.67772222222223|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Atago Shrine''' (愛宕神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto Shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located at Kuki Chuo 1-chome 12, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|qid=Q47535|lt=Kuki City|1=Kuki, Saitama}}. == Overview == Atago Shrine was formerly a {{ill|Village Shrine|de|Village Shrine|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Village Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} of Kuki Shinmachi (which, after the Meiji merger, became part of Ōaza Kuki Shin) in {{ill|Saitama District|de|Saitama District|ja|埼玉郡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama District|1=Saitama district|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11427160}}. Its address was once known as “Nakajima 1077, Kuki Shin, {{ill|Oaza|de|Oaza|ja|大字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oaza|1=ōaza|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q424857}}” with the {{ill|koaza|de|koaza|ja|小字|lt=character|lt_ja=字|lt_de=Zeichen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/koaza|1=koaza|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5327509}} Nakajima, but on November 1, {{ill|1973|en|1973|qid=Q2477|lt=1973|1=1973}} ({{ill|Shōwa era|en|Shōwa era|qid=Q327567|lt=Showa|1=Shōwa era}} 48) it was changed to “Chuo 1-chome 12” due to the introduction of {{ill|Address Numbering|de|Address Numbering|ja|住居表示|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Address Numbering|1=residential address indication|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q101824893}}, and further, on March 23, {{ill|2010|en|2010|qid=Q1995|lt=2010|1=2010}} ({{ill|Heisei era|en|Heisei era|qid=Q234510|lt=Heisei|1=Heisei era}} 22) during the {{ill|Great Heisei Merger|de|Great Heisei Merger|ja|平成の大合併|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Great Heisei Merger|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to Japanese cities and townsの廃置分合|1=Municipal mergers and dissolutions in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q2411657}} it was renamed “Kuki Chuo 1-chome 12”, which remains its address today. As of {{ill|1948|en|1948|qid=Q5165|lt=1948|1=1948}} (Showa 23), the area of the shrine grounds ({{ill|Area|en|Area|qid=Q11500|lt=area|1=Area}}) was 213 {{ill|Pyeong|en|Pyeong|qid=Q706688|lt=tsubo|1=Pyeong}}. The annual {{ill|festival|de|festival|ja|祭礼|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/festival|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 祭|1=Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q132241}} is held on July 24. == In the City: Atago Shrines == * {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kuki City Kitakanakosone)|de|Atago Shrine (Kuki City Kitakanakosone)|ja|愛宕神社 (久喜市北中曽根)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine (Kuki City Kitakanakosone)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502378|1=Atago Shrine (Kuki City Kitakanakosone)}} – located in Kitakanakosone {{ill|koaza|de|koaza|ja|小字|lt=character|lt_ja=字|lt_de=Zeichen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/koaza|1=koaza|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5327509}} Kawatsuma. * {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kuki City Rokumambo)|de|Atago Shrine (Kuki City Rokumambo)|ja|愛宕神社 (久喜市六万部)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Atago Shrine (Kuki City Rokumambo)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135502380|1=Atago Shrine (Kuki City Rokumambo)}} – located in Rokumambo, Yatadamuki. In addition, other shrines with the name Atago Shrine (Kuki Chuo) also enshrine {{ill|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|en|Atago Shrine (Kyoto)|qid=Q713021|lt=Atago Shrine|1=Atago Shrine (Kyoto)}} in the form of {{ill|Combined Enshrinement|de|Combined Enshrinement|ja|合祀|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Combined Enshrinement|1=Co-Enshrinement|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11412524}} or as a {{ill|Precinct Shrine|de|Precinct Shrine|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Precinct Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}}, such as {{ill|Chikachigami Shrine|de|Chikachigami Shrine|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|lt=Chikachigami Shrine|lt_ja=千勝神社|lt_de=Chikachigami Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikachigami Shrine|1=Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405390}} in Honcho 6-chome. == See Also & Surroundings == * {{ill|Naka-ochibori River|de|Naka-ochibori River|ja|中落堀川|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka-ochibori River|1=Nakaotoshihori River|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11366975}} (Bridge: Atago Bridge) * {{ill|Municipal Road|de|Municipal Road|ja|市道|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Municipal Road|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 市町村道|1=municipal road|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10276558}}: Atago Street (the road on the west side of the shrine, {{ill|Road|en|Road|qid=Q34442|lt=Road|1=Road}}) * {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|qid=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station|1=Kuki Station (Saitama)}} * {{ill|Kuki Plaza|de|Kuki Plaza|ja|クッキープラザ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Plaza|1=Cookie Plaza|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11298730}} * {{ill|Onjinyama Ruins|de|Onjinyama Ruins|ja|御陣山遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onjinyama Ruins|1=Gojinyama Ruins|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11489349}} * {{ill|Ota Shrine|de|Ota Shrine|ja|太田神社 (久喜市久喜北)|lt=Ota Shrine|lt_ja=太田神社|lt_de=Ota Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ota Shrine|1=Ota Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11444367}} == Access == * Approximately a 3-minute walk (about 250 {{ill|Metre|en|Metre|qid=Q11573|lt=m|1=Metre}}) north from the west exit of {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|qid=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station|1=Kuki Station (Saitama)}}, as measured by {{ill|Walking Time|de|Walking Time|ja|徒歩所要時間|lt=walk|lt_ja=徒歩|lt_de=zu Fuß|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Walking Time|1=time required for walking|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11488706}}.[http://yahoo.jp/kL_lTh Atago Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Official Website. == References == {{Reflist|qq=}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" – Kuki City Tourist Walking Map]|qq=}} – Kuki City Official Website * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map – Old Course] – Kuki City Chamber of Commerce Official Website * [http://kukiguru.x0.com/ka/atagocyaya/index.html Atago Teahouse] – Kukiguru Official Website {{shinto-stub|qq=}} {{Atago Faith|qq=}} {{translated page|ja|愛宕神社 (久喜市久喜中央)|version=102266188|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:愛宕神社 (久喜市久喜中央)]] [[de:Atago-Schrein (Kuki Chuo)]] {{wikidata link|Q11493855}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kuki, Saitama]] [[Category:Son-sha in Saitama Prefecture]] [[Category:Atago shrines]]
